name: Acquazzurra Indonesian Chicken Madras
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat 2 tablespoons of vegetable oil in a skillet over medium heat.
2. Brown the chicken pieces until cooked through, about 6-8 minutes per side.
3. Transfer the browned chicken to an oven preheated to 400°F (200°C).
4. Cook for an additional 10 minutes in the oven.
5. In the same skillet, stir in the curry powder and cook for 1 minute.
6. Add the mango puree and coconut milk to the skillet.
7. Season with salt and pepper.
8. Simmer the mixture for 2-3 minutes, stirring occasionally.
9. Stir in the whipping cream and simmer for an additional 3-5 minutes.
10. Serve the chicken with the mango sauce on top.
